black_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

blue_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

book_cloning.note: Combine a written book with a book and quill to copy its contents.

brown_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

cyan_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

decorated_pot.note: Arrange four pottery sherds (or bricks) around the edges of the crafting grid to craft a decorated pot.

firework_rocket.note: Combine paper, gunpowder, and up to 8 firework stars to craft a firework rocket.

firework_star.note: Combine gunpowder with dyes and optional shape/effect ingredients to craft a firework star.

firework_star_fade.note: Add extra dyes to an existing firework star to give it a fade-to-color effect.

gray_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

green_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

leather_boots_dyed.note: Dye an item, such as leather armor or a wolf collar, using any color of dye.

leather_chestplate_dyed.note: Dye an item, such as leather armor or a wolf collar, using any color of dye.

leather_helmet_dyed.note: Dye an item, such as leather armor or a wolf collar, using any color of dye.

leather_horse_armor_dyed.note: Dye an item, such as leather armor or a wolf collar, using any color of dye.

leather_leggings_dyed.note: Dye an item, such as leather armor or a wolf collar, using any color of dye.

light_blue_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

light_gray_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

lime_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

magenta_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

map_extending.note: Combine a filled map with paper to extend it to the next zoom level.

orange_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

pink_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

purple_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

red_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

repair_item.note: Combine two damaged items of the same type to repair them, combining their remaining durability.

shield_decoration.note: Combine a shield with a banner to apply the banner's pattern.

tipped_arrow.note: Dip an item into a lingering potion to imbue it with the potion's effect, e.g. crafting tipped arrows.

white_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.

wolf_armor_dyed.note: Dye an item, such as leather armor or a wolf collar, using any color of dye.

yellow_banner_duplicate.note: Combine a banner with a matching blank banner to duplicate its pattern.
